reviews.review_description:
Visuals: better than hitman 3, kinda looked like roblox level graphics for me. Felt very balanced.

Gameplay: you can literally reverse grip the sword and even use the barrack as a parry blunt weapon tho it deals too little damage. And also I felt little weird with the two handed greatsword, it didnt suit me at all so I unstead just went one handed.
I was enjoying the game, it was one of my gi to games and I put a ton of hours in but ever since the new update it's stuck on the loading screen.

developer_response.body: I'm very sorry for the unpleasant experience you had. Please try clearing the game data and opening the game again

reviews.review_description: If your on fence about it and want a real sword fighting game just do it. I'm very happy i got it. Great price amazing game. Will put a lot of time into it...  only thing i would want is to customize the blade like colors wise. If i could get a neon purple sword i would be in heaven. Lol
Game is amazing I love it if not for a small stupid game breaking bug where if you change the z rotation of your hand negative back to positive it deletes all of your data:D

developer_response.body: Oh my god, I'm very sorry, this is a way for me to hide a debugging archive I deserve this negative review, I'm very sorry!

reviews.review_description: One of the best roguelikes I have ever played - amazing combat, fair difficulty and high skill ceiling. Parrying is addictive just like in Sekiro, but now you are personally responsible for appropriate movements with your sword which makes it even better. You really feel like a swordmaster.

reviews.review_title: Basically unplayable due to the Vignette
reviews.review_description: I really tried to do it, i tried to play it. But the vignette made me feel genuinely blind have the time

developer_response.body: Hi，Vignette can call up the settings menu to close it

reviews.review_description: so I haven't played this in a while and I started to play and the update that came out makes  you lose half of your coin when u die so basically impossible to progress unless u grind easy mode. this game doesnt need grinding

developer_response.body: This is a misunderstanding. Since its release, the game has always maintained the setting of deducting half of the earned coins after a loss.

reviews.review_description: The sandbox alone is incredibly enjoyable for hours and will have you coming back, my only hope is more bosses, better story mode and consistent updates.

developer_response.body: I will continue to add new content in future updates (though it may not be very frequent).

reviews.review_description:
I thought crazy good physics are what made these types of games good but clearly I was wrong. The sword combat in this game feels great. Ain’t nothing like getting in a fast paced 1v1 with an enemy, and it feels like it came straight out of a movie. If I were to make a suggestion, I feel like a game like this needs an actual katana. The other swords don’t get me wrong are super cool but an actual katana would be great. Also I understand there’s a huge workload but just an idea.

Edit: The katana is sick bro! Exactly what I was imagining, keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: AMAZING GAME.. But I'm a bit stuck..
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty much perfect, the combat physics, the wide range of abilities with amazing descriptions on how to use them. Another 10/10 thing is the difference between enemies and how they work, most combat games will just copy and paste enemies with different weapons, but this game has SO many enemies, mini bosses, spear users, final bosses, weaker enemies and all of them have completely different fighting styles. Another thing I love is how fun every part of the game is, the sandbox is just pure fun if you want to feel like a sword god, and the main area of the game, the campaign thingy I don't know what to call it, but its PERFECT, when I got this game I wasn't really expecting to actually do the main part of the game, I though I was probably just gonna mess around in the sandbox, but oh my it's amazing! Now onto my reason for 4 star and not 5, recently, when I ever I attempt to boot up the game it is just stuck in the loading screen, never actually going in the game, and I don't know how to fix it, I hope the dev can help me out please 😭 but none the less 10/10 game

developer_response.body: I’m very sorry that you encountered the bug preventing you from entering the game. If reinstalling the game doesn’t solve the issue, you’ll need to clear the game data. I’ll thoroughly investigate this problem as soon as possible, thank you. Or Joining our discord

reviews.review_description: It's really cool. Lots of style straight out of a wuxia novel . The combat is fast and free flowing if a bit arcadey . Multi-player on the challenge mode would be nice even if just invite only. But still impressive work bro I love it. Adressing complaints about the parrying . I like it you gotta do it on purpose most of the times

This game feels like Sekiro VR!
  Yes, it's more of a rouge like, but that makes it even better. Every fight with an enemy, even "weak" ones feels epic. The skills in the game (especially instant slash) are a touch on top of fluid combat mechanics that makes every run a little different if you want it to be, right now the skills are a little lacking in number. But that doesn't matter. The hilt decorations with stat bonuses for skills and various passive bonuses make up for it.

  I ABSOLUTELY LOVE the assassins in this game, the mix of fast pace melee and also fast pace range makes for an epic fight. I would love more speed based enemies like this in the future PLEASE!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the love! I'm actually working on a ton of new content right now — including three new skill sets, a bunch stat bonuses of new hilt decorations, and even a Japanese-style map with matching enemies. Everything is coming together to push the game more and more toward that Sekiro VR vibe!

reviews.review_description: This game is incredible ! Only thing keeping it from 5 stars for me is the lack of a story. We've got no context about where we are, who is Yi, and why we are fighting. But the game is quite realistic and the fights are really great.

developer_response.body: I’m also sorry that I wasn’t able to tell a complete story. Please enjoy the arcade-style combat experience.

reviews.review_description: It’s enjoyable, but does it transition to another scene? I’ve completed the first boss twice, but it doesn’t progress to the next stage. I get sweaty and panting after the “fight,” which feels like a workout. I even injured my finger in the sword fight because I slammed it on the table. Haha!

developer_response.body: Hello, currently there are 3 bosses in the game, and the casual difficulty is only 2 bosses

reviews.review_description: I never write reviews, for anything. So trust me when i say that this game is so unbelievably peak. It's sn absolute steal for a fiver, and it's worth every penny. Combat is fluid, intuitive and so fun. Genuine 10/10 game, thank you devs!
Neds check points and more updates thanks devs

developer_response.body: The game will automatically save at the beginning and end of each level. New content is in development, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I’ve never written a review but this game made me want to write one, this is probably the most fun sword game I’ve purchased. Highly recommend fr fr 👍👍

This is by far one of my most favorite games of all time, I do Martial Arts outside VR & own a wooden Dao that I use for practice. That being said - I really appreciate the love and detail behind this game, just found out I can reverse grip & seamlessly switch to normal grip/back to reverse. You can attack with your sheath but it does very low damage, great blocking responses & unique in-game mechanics highlights the pros; I'm glad there are no indicators like "Until You Fall" (that's an immersion killer w/arrows)
Swordtirp however, is just full blown fighting/rogue-like immersion that doesn't end. Mixed reality feels great, Sandbox mode is awesome. I am lucky to have y'all decide to make such a good game with an unbeatable price. 
Truly a masterpiece of what it's trying to capture. It's also fair to note: I literally don't EVER do reviews. But I can't help wanting to join your Discord server & be part of this wonderful discussion of a stellar game & to let you be aware you are on the right track of development, thank you ✨☯️

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
5/5

reviews.review_title: How is this game under the radar!?
reviews.review_description: Let me start by saying wait a go devs! It’s so well done and really each boss fight feels like it’s been pulled right off the big screen. The game is beautiful and the price tag is easily worth it. The game offers mixed reality is basically a must now a days. Does this game have room for growth sure! But it’s so well on its way and arguably better than some of the “AAA” titles on this platform. Check out my channel PR-IN-VR on YouTube . I will likely be doing a full review in the coming days.

This is game is awesome and addictive. I got a lot of sweat and fun time with this game. It's simple but good gamification. The physics is good. 

Hope to get more bosses, stages or spells in the future.

I bought this game looking for a good sword fighting experience, and I was not disappointed! The gameplay, the graphics, everything is perfect.   Bugs here and there, but what game doesn't have  any lol. Definitely worth the money. One thing I have to say is add different styles, like dual swords or something. Though it is perfect as is.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion! I'll seriously consider adding new weapon types beyond just swords, but it involves quite a bit of underlying system changes. So, new weapon types might take some time to arrive. 😊

reviews.review_description: I love this game it’s fun and challenging would love to see new bosses added
Devs can u put Nunchanku weapon in Bruce Lee fav weapon 👍

It’s ok, I really like the sword weight (not wobbly like B&S). I got stuck at the tutorial it was confusing and fiddly. It took about 50 attempts to parry in the advanced tutorial… each stage is decent but then you have to mess around for about 2 minutes with rewards. There’s no reaction to getting sliced with swords, they just stand there vacantly and then dissapear into the floor when they die. Honestly it’s basically Ninja Legends (2021) but less of a work out, less gore, less reaction from the enemies… just not as good. Also similar to Until You Fall but not as good .

developer_response.body: Oh, sorry to hear that the tutorial level got you stuck. Regarding claiming the reward, you just need to jump toward the glowing ring to teleport there — it only takes a few seconds.

reviews.review_description:
This game is just so well thought out and executed. Elements of Until You Fall and Battle Talent, with its own unique style of combat. Fun upgrade system to keep you coming back and learning g the enemies strikes and perfecting the parry is rewarding. 

Also the mixed reality mode is easy to make happen, just starts up right away without an exhaustive room boundary set up. Really fun and you can get some good exercise too. Also can't believe how much better this game looks than games with a huge development staff.

Edit: would love a music volume control bar so I can mute it and put on my own Playlist.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion. I will add a BGM volume adjustment option in the next version.

reviews.review_description: I might have overlooked this one for not being as physics-based, but SwordTrip has a lot of style and really satisfying design choices. Most of all, the mixed reality mode makes this a nice game to play in passthrough. If you're into the sword games, this is worth the price.

After playing until the fall , this is a gem.
But am not used to one sword style too much .
I prefer both swords in my hand actually.
Hope they make that .. am not rorona zoro for asking three swords style 😛

developer_response.body: Since the skills in the game are all designed for swords with scabbards, adding other weapons is quite difficult. I apologize for this limitation in the framework.

reviews.review_description: How do you change the language back to English on the game it's stuck on mandarin

developer_response.body: I'm very sorry that I didn’t keep the "Language" option text as "Language" and instead used translations in different languages — that's my mistake! The language option is the second-to-last item in the settings menu. I will fix this issue soon. Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game so much! 
🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the 5 star review!  
If you feel too short in the game, you can switch to Sit Mode in the menu — this will increase your in-game height by a certain amount.

reviews.review_title: I AM THE STORM THAT IS APPROACHING
reviews.review_description:
Makes me feel motivated 

- Vergil

Didn't expect this.. is this still early access or not? Cause it's more polished than some other full releases..
Foremost a lot of devs should take an example and include the choice to pick your performance/graphics level. It looks really good on the high (not the extreme) setting.
The presentation is very well done.

Gameplay is some seriously fast-paced action, great swordplay, one of the very best, if not the best.
It could have some better sort of feedback to know if you parried succesfully or not, it's not always obvious. But I only played for half an hour, so it might become clearer as I play more. 
I just wanted to get on here and share my thoughts on this magnificent game.

I refunded Clone Drone for this one, glad I did, this is a lot more to my liking


Add me for a discount to this and other games, in my bio

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! The game will continue to receive new content updates, although the update frequency might not be very fast (since I’m the sole developer of this game).   : )

reviews.review_description: The combat is way better than I thought it would be, there is so much depth to it as well, and for its price it is an amazing deal!
If you like sekiro you will like this, this is basically a Chinese sekiro vr game but it’s a rogue

I have played (on friends headset) and owned almost all of the quest fighting games but this game is in its own League. The game "swordsman" used to be my favorite but it has a very strong competitor in the guise of this game. After I had tried this on my friends headset; I couldn't wait to get back home and to buy my own copy so as to support the developer.  Would recommend this highly to any person who enjoys working out while having fun.

reviews.review_title: Oh my God I love it this game
reviews.review_description: I have every fighting game that may have came out for VR whether it be through the quest store or the app lab I will say this game feels better moves better than swordsman and I love that game great job fellas great job to the developers of this game please keep it coming I look forward to seeing more of your work I wish boy do I wish there was a YouTube video displaying this to all who don't know about it I looked it up I cannot find it anywhere but I'm enjoying it and I'll tell as many people about this game as possible because this game is amazing please bring out the multiplayer or the other missions need to be unlocked because the challenge mode is wanted amazing five stars in my book I would give it a 10 if I could

developer_response.body: Thank you for your appreciation! The lack of promotion is because I am an independent developer from mainland China who has never been abroad. However, I am very grateful to Meta for providing a global platform, allowing players outside of mainland China to experience this game.

reviews.review_description: The actual swordfighting is terrible and lacks any physics or sense of impact at all.  There's a dozen much better swordfighting vr game options

developer_response.body: Yes, this is not a sword-fighting game focused on physics simulation. Its main experience is a faster-paced combat style.

reviews.review_description: This game is so cool. It feels like Sekiro, the controls are very easy to get used to, the gameplay is refreshing and sometimes challenging. But that’s what makes it so fun. This game is honestly worth way more than just 5$ it is so severely underrated.
Phenomenal game. Buy it. No more needs to be said.

developer_response.body: I'm so happy to hear that

reviews.review_title: This is the best fast paced combat!
reviews.review_description: I love this game because of its fast paced combat than any other games out there! I sweat a lot and a great workout! The parrying, blocking mechanics is so great its so satisfying! Rougelite makes great loop game mechanics. Also I feel like playinng soulslike combat but VR. Thank you devs for this amazing game worth the money. Please devs add more content to this game like adding weapons such as single and double nunchucks or any weapons and many more boss enemies types, maps, etc.🔥☺️

developer_response.body: Thank you! The game is continuously being updated with more content~

reviews.review_title: Small in scale but beautifully crafted.
reviews.review_description: For a game created by an independent developer, it's more polished than I expected. The interactions and interface are complete and have a consistent style with a Chinese aesthetic. The combat is fast-paced and great for working out. If you're into Chinese martial arts and want to break a sweat, this game is perfect!
This game is a stunning blend of visuals and action!  The combat system is incredibly smooth. I love it so much! I hope the developers keep updating and bringing more exciting content!

reviews.review_title: Bro, this game deserves 5 star review
reviews.review_description: Amazing combat, epic boss fights I can never before ￼
Great game, strong Chinese elements, excellent combat, thanks to the developer! (Can you believe the development team is only one person!
nice
China traditional martial arts fighting, unique style and play, recommended.
Really smooth and fun!  Killer style compliments the combat nicely!   ☯
